stories.headline_en: OpenAI admits an AI ‘agent’ caused a major cyber breach by itself

perspectives.headline: OpenAI admits an AI ‘agent’ caused a major cyber breach by itself
perspectives.excerpt: AI lab’s advanced models escaped testing ‘sandbox’ to hack Hugging Face

perspectives.headline: OpenAI Models Escaped Containment and Hacked Hugging Face
perspectives.excerpt: The cybersecurity-focused models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke out of a testing sandbox, exploited a zero-day, and gained access to the open internet to pull off the attack.

perspectives.headline: OpenAI admits its models hacked Hugging Face on their own
perspectives.excerpt: OpenAI admits its models hacked Hugging Face on their own They escaped an isolated environment for testing and infiltrated Hugging Face without human input. Picture this: A couple of powerful AI models being tested by their company escaped a controlled environment, got on the internet and then hacked a machine learning repository on their own, without human input.…

perspectives.headline: Here's what smart people are saying about OpenAI models hacking Hugging Face on their own
perspectives.excerpt: An AI agent broke out of its sandbox, got onto the internet, and broke into another company's systems all on its own, according to OpenAI. Hugging Face, an open-source AI platform, announced last week it had experienced a security incident in which an autonomous AI agent had accessed some of its internal datasets, but said the large language model behind the intrusion was unknown.…

perspectives.headline: OpenAI Says Its Models Accidentally Hacked Hugging Face
perspectives.excerpt: OpenAI said its advanced artificial intelligence models inadvertently hacked Hugging Face Inc. in an “unprecedented” incident that prompted fresh calls for curbs on the technology.

stories.headline_en: France passes law banning under-15s from social media

perspectives.headline: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
perspectives.excerpt: France passes law banning under-15s from social media - Published France's parliament has approved a law to ban social media for under-15s from January 2027, making it the first European country to block young people from the platforms.…

perspectives.headline: France becomes first EU country to ban social media access for under-15s
perspectives.excerpt: France’s parliament has approved a bill banning social media access for children under 15, making it the first EU country to bar children from apps such as TikTok. The president, Emmanuel Macron, has championed the ban as a key reform of his final term in office and pledged to enforce it by September.…

perspectives.headline: 'It has to work': France nears approval of under-15 social media ban
perspectives.excerpt: France's two houses of parliament are expected to give final approval to legislation that bars under-15s from social media. The bill comes amid concern over mental health of young people. If approved, France would follow Australia's lead, where the world's first ban ​for under-16s ‌on platforms including Facebook, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube came into ⁠force in December.

perspectives.headline: France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children
perspectives.excerpt: France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children France will ban social media for under-15s from September 1, following the UK and Australia’s moves toward blanket restrictions.…

perspectives.headline: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
perspectives.excerpt: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

stories.headline_en: Nvidia раскрыла свою долю в Nebius Аркадия Воложа — производителю чипов принадлежит почти 10% компании

perspectives.headline: Nvidia раскрыла свою долю в Nebius Аркадия Воложа — производителю чипов принадлежит почти 10% компании
perspectives.excerpt: Nvidia раскрыла свою долю в Nebius Аркадия Воложа — производителю чипов принадлежит почти 10% компании Это около 22,26 млн ценных бумагNvidia раскрыла размер своей доли в Nebius Group, созданной сооснователем «Яндекса» Аркадием Воложем, сообщает CNBC. Американскому производителю чипов принадлежит 9,3% акций компании — это около 22,26 млн ценных бумаг.…

perspectives.headline: Nvidia раскрыла долю в 9,3% в Nebius Аркадия Воложа
perspectives.excerpt: Nvidia в понедельник раскрыла в отчетности для Комиссии по ценным бумагам и биржам США (SEC) долю в 9,3% в компании Nebius. На премаркете во вторник акции Nebius прибавляли около 6,4%, до $194. За последние 12 месяцев бумага подорожала почти на 250%, а капитализация компании на утро вторника составляла около $46 млрд.…
